metadata.title: Return to Sender (From "Girls! Girls! Girls!")
metadata.lyrics:
[00:01.47] Return to sender
[00:04.63] Return to sender
[00:08.40] I gave a letter to the postman
[00:11.94] He put it in his sack
[00:14.71] Bright in early next morning
[00:18.63] He brought my letter back
[00:21.54] (She wrote upon it)
[00:23.34] Return to sender
[00:26.75] Address unknown
[00:30.61] No such number
[00:34.27] No such zone
[00:37.98] We had a quarrel
[00:41.37] A lover's spat
[00:44.39] I write I'm sorry
[00:47.68] But my letter keeps coming back
[00:52.85] So then I dropped it in the mailbox
[00:56.08] And sent it special D
[00:59.95] Bright in early next morning
[01:03.02] It came right back to me
[01:05.83] (She wrote upon it)
[01:07.38] Return to sender
[01:11.28] Address unknown
[01:14.85] No such person
[01:18.56] No such zone
[01:22.25] This time I'm gonna take it myself
[01:25.14] And put it right in her hand
[01:29.20] And if it comes back the very next day
[01:32.96] Then I'll understand
[01:35.71] (The writing on it)
[01:37.38] Return to sender
[01:41.03] Address unknown
[01:44.39] No such number
[01:48.02] No such zone
[01:52.04] Return to sender
[01:55.42] Return to sender
[01:59.62] Return to sender
[02:03.37] Return to sender
